name: mann_whitneyu
desc: A non-parametric statistical test used to compare differences between two independent groups on a continuous or ordinal variable.
label: Mann-Whitney U Test on Flower

y.label: Grouping Variable (dependent)
y.desc: A binary nominal variable that divides the dataset into two independent groups. The Mann-Whitney U test compares these two groups.

x.label: Variable (independent)
x.desc: A continuous or ordinal variable whose distributions in the two groups are compared using the Mann-Whitney U test. Ordinal data is treated as numerical for validation.
